title: If Gold Rises In 2023, Newmont's Cash Dividend Trounces Treasury Bonds
text: Newmont declined better than 50% in price between April and August, opening up a 5% dividend yield for new buyers in recent months. A large rise in gold bullion prices next year could support dividend raises.

title: What's Happening With Newmont Stock?

title: Newmont ranked top miner in 2022 Dow Jones Sustainability World Index
text: (Kitco News) - Top gold mining company Newmont (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT) said on Tuesday that it has joined the Dow Jones Sustainability World Index (DJSI World) for the 15th year in a row.

title: Newmont Ranked Top Miner in 2022 Dow Jones Sustainability World Index
text: DENVER--( BUSINESS WIRE )--For the 15th year in a row, Newmont Corporation (NYSE: NEM, TSX: NGT) joins the Dow Jones Sustainability™ World Index (DJSI World), representing the top 10% of the largest 2,500 companies in the S&P Global Broad Market Index. DJSI World membership is based on long-term economic factors, as well as leading environmental, social and governance (ESG) performance evaluated through the 2022 S&P Global Corporate Sustainability Assessment (CSA).

title: 3 High Dividend-Paying Stocks In The Sweet Spot Of Yield Investing
text: It's been a difficult year for many an investor. Equity REITs and mortgage REITs have been pummeled especially hard. Many high-single-digit yielders may be in permanent decline, as their dividend payout is actually greater than their total return, eroding the companies' equity market value.

title: The 7 Best Commodity Stocks to Buy for 2023
text: While the business news cycle tends to focus on the latest technological innovations, it's important to consider the best commodity stocks to buy for 2023 as these companies undergird said advancements. As recent geopolitical flashpoints demonstrated, access to critical resources is just as important as the end products they help facilitate.

title: 2 Golden Dividend Opportunities For A Fed Pivot
text: In this article, we look at a somewhat uncommon source of dividends: gold miners. In light of a looming Fed pivot, macroeconomic developments are increasingly favoring gold miners.
